arts.ttl: Man United to battle it out with Tottenham for 28-year-old South American
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur have been linked with a move for the Botafogo goalkeeper John Victor. The player’s agent has revealed to Football Insider that the 28-year-old wants to join a club in the Premier League, and it will be interesting to see if Manchester United and Tottenham are prepared to submit an offer […] The post Man United to battle it out with Tottenham for 28-year-old South American appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou tells 'bruised egos' to fight for Spurs
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has demanded his Tottenham Hotspur players show more fight and says he has no time for "bruised egos", after describing Timo Werner’s performance in their 1-1 draw with Rangers "unacceptable". Postecoglou says his criticism after the UEFA Europa League draw in Glasgow extended beyond Werner, as he asked for more from his senior players this weekend following four defeats from seven Premier League matches.

arts.ttl: Liverpool injury, suspension list and return dates for Southampton: Robertson, Tsimikas, Konate
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Liverpool's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's EFL Cup quarter-final with Southampton.

arts.ttl: Tottenham offered the chance to sign £13 million-rated South American
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are looking to improve their defensive unit with the signing of the South American defender Omar Alderete. The Paraguayan international is on the radar of Wolves, Leicester City and Crystal Palace as well. According to TBR Football, Tottenham could move for the player in the coming weeks and the defender’s representatives have already […] The post Tottenham offered the chance to sign £13 million-rated South American appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Southampton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham travel to face Southampton in the Premier League on Sunday evening with Ange Postecoglou under pressure. The North London side sit 12th in the Premier League table and have won just once in their last eight across all competitions. arts.ttl: Southampton vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham face bottom-of-the-table Southampton as they try to bounce back from a tough spell. Both sides like to play expansive football and will be sensing vulnerability in each other this weekend. Southampton have a slight advantage over Spurs having had a full week’s rest after their narrow defeat to Aston Villa. arts.ttl: What Ange Postecoglou told off Pedro Porro for on the pitch after Tottenham's Rangers draw
arts.sum: Rangers won many of the physical battles against Tottenham on the night and Postecoglou was asked whether he has enough fighters in his squad, both in all and available right now to him. Ange Postecoglou admits he gave Pedro Porro some constructive feedback on the pitch following Tottenham's draw at Rangers on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: How to watch Southampton vs Tottenham TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Spurs will go into the match as favourites with the Saints currently sitting bottom of the Premier League, having won one and drew two of their opening 15 games. Before any of the weekend’s Premier League games, Spurs sit in 11th place in the table but will be hoping the position improves by the end of the weekend.
